description: TensorAccessor full-chip address-calculation (get_noc_addr) CI golden (Wormhole, wh_n300_civ2). Metric = average device cycles for get_noc_addr across the full Tensix grid, one pinned all-static config per tensor topology, keyed by GetNocAddr.<topology>. All values are null = record mode while the silicon baseline is collected on CI; re-arm once run-to-run spread is known.
pinned_config: unit_tests_ttnn_accessor AccessorFullChipBenchmarks.GetNocAddr, full compute grid, all-static config per topology, device profiler
